calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-12-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: A. James Robertson, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Susan Parkinson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff FREDERICK CHINN AS TRUSTEE OF THE WAY Y. CHINN AND MARIAN K. CHINN IRREVOCABLE TRUST DATED 10/3/1985.
Witnesses FREDERICK CHINN and Molly Fong sworn and examined on behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by or on behalf of Defendant SALAH ABDOUN and BRENDAN GALLEN.
Court ordered Defendants DOES 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendants as follows:
The Rental Agreement is canceled. The lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1437 Lincoln Way #4, San Francisco, California 94121, San Francisco.
Damages $0
Holdover damages $6480.00
Pre-judgment interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $0
For a Total Judgment of $6480.00

Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-12-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-08-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Cynthia Lee; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Frederick Chinn is present.
Attorney Susan Parkinson for the plaintiff.
Defendant Salah Abdoun is present.
Attorney Anthony Burchell appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of DEC-12-2016 remains on calendar. (501)
